heading: Yatte Yattah vs Yaven Creek — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Yatte Yattah, New South Wales and Yaven Creek, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Yaven Creek has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Yatte Yattah (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Yatte Yattah or Yaven Creek safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Yatte Yattah has a flood risk score of 49/100, while Yaven Creek scores 43/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Yatte Yattah scores 21/100 for bushfire risk. Yaven Creek scores 40/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Yatte Yattah or Yaven Creek?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Yaven Creek has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.88% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
